CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Continued To Jun-13-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Progress Report Re: Special Needs Trust. Written Report To Be Provided To The Court No Later Than May 27, 2016.
Off Calendar Jan-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Todd P. Emanuel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/Petitioner: Melodi L., mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Jane Doe; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $750,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $186,089.83 payable to Emanuel Law Group.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the Petitioner or the Petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $5,640.69
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $191,730.52
A net balance of $558,269.48 to be disbursed by the following methods:

$258,269.480 will be made payable pursuant to the terms of the court's order in the Minor's Compromise on August 6, 2015 for purchase of single premium annuity.

$100,269.48 payable to a blocked account in the Annalise L. Liskey Special Needs Trust.

$200,000.00 shall be paid after the defendants sell two San Francisco properties they hold, or after the death of both defendants.
If the event triggering this final installment occurs while Jane Doe is a minor, Petitioner shall file a new Amended Petitioner for Minor's compromise to address the placement of those funds.

Status Hearing Scheduled on April 25, 2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for Status of Special Needs Trust.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

Order signed in Open court.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Todd P. Emanuel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Melodi Liskey, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Jane Doe; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $750,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $186,089.83 payable to Emanuel Law Group.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitoner's attorney in the total amount of $5,640.69
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $191,730.52
A net balance of $558,269.48 to be disbursed by the following methods: $358,269.480 will be made payable pursuant to the terms of the court's order in the Minor's Compromise or on before June 1, 2015.
$200,000.00 will be paid 60 days after the close of escrow of defendants' property, but no later than 180 days after the death of the last surviving defendant. Continued on Attachment 7c(2)(b).
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 29, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for Status of Special Needs Trust. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
Order signed in Open court.
